2026-03-27T04:19:47.0007206Z Agent: 
2026-03-27T04:19:47.0009142Z Agent: Looking closer at the actual changes, the `T | null` removals are technically breaking changes at the type level—anyone previously passing `null` values would hit TypeScript errors now—but they're not documented as breaking changes in the changelog. The real driver here is the emitter upgrade from 0.49.0 to 0.50.4, which fixed various type issues, though whether this constitutes a tooling problem or a design oversight depends on the broader context.

2026-03-27T04:19:47.2257901Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2258524Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2258997Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2259478Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2260135Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2260704Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2261067Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2261408Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2261734Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-27T04:19:47.2262131Z [36;1mfi[0m
